technology.label: Technology
technology.title: What Makes a DLL Helmet Smart?
technology.description: We redefine smart helmets with Active Safety and premium design. Every feature is engineered to enhance your safety, visibility, and riding experience.

features.title: Integrated LED Lighting
features.description: 360° visibility with front and rear lights, automatic brake lights, and turn signals. Be seen day and night.

features.title: Crash Detection & SOS
features.description: Built-in accelerometer detects hard impacts. If you don't respond to the safety check, an SOS text with your location is sent automatically.

features.title: MIPS Protection
features.description: Multi-directional Impact Protection System reduces rotational forces during angled impacts, providing superior brain protection.

features.title: Bluetooth Audio
features.description: Built-in speakers and microphone for music, navigation prompts, and hands-free calls. Stay connected without earbuds.

features.title: 100% Waterproof
features.description: All electronics are fully sealed against rain and splashes. Ride confidently in any weather condition.

features.title: 12+ Hour Battery
features.description: All-day battery life with USB-C fast charging. Get from 0 to 80% in just 45 minutes.

comparison.label: Smart vs Regular
comparison.description: Traditional helmets only protect on impact. A DLL smart helmet actively works to prevent accidents and get you help when you need it — before, during, and after a ride.
points: 360° LED visibility reduces accident risk by up to 47%
Automatic crash detection alerts emergency contacts
Turn signals communicate your intentions to drivers
MIPS technology for superior rotational impact protection
Hands-free calls & navigation keep eyes on the road

items.question: What is a smart helmet?
items.answer: A smart helmet is advanced protective headgear that integrates electronic features to enhance rider safety, visibility, and experience. It combines traditional impact protection with modern technology like LED lighting, sensors, Bluetooth connectivity, and crash detection.

items.question: How does crash detection work?
items.answer: Our helmets have a built-in accelerometer that detects hard impacts. After a detected crash, a safety check timer goes off in the companion app. If you fail to respond, an SOS text message with your GPS location is automatically sent to your emergency contacts.

items.question: Are DLL smart helmets certified for safety?
items.answer: Yes. All DLL helmets meet or exceed CPSC, EN 1078, and AS/NZS 2063 safety standards. Our MIPS-equipped models provide additional rotational impact protection beyond standard certification requirements.

items.question: How do I connect the helmet to my phone?
items.answer: Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds to enter pairing mode — the LED will flash blue. Open your phone's Bluetooth settings, find 'DLL Helmet' in the list, and tap to connect. The companion app provides additional customization options.

items.question: Can I use the helmet in rain?
items.answer: Absolutely. All electronics in DLL smart helmets are 100% waterproof (IPX6 rated). The LED lights, speakers, crash sensors, and charging port are fully sealed against rain, splashes, and even high-pressure water jets.

items.question: What's the battery life?
items.answer: DLL smart helmets provide 12+ hours of battery life with normal use (lights on medium, Bluetooth connected). USB-C fast charging gets you from 0 to 80% in just 45 minutes. A full charge takes approximately 90 minutes.

items.title: 1-Year Warranty

items.question: Are DLL accessories compatible with all helmet models?
items.answer: DLL accessories are designed specifically for DLL Smart Helmet Pro, Lite, and Kids models. Visors and inner padding are model-specific — please check the product description for compatibility. Charging cables and carry bags are universal across all DLL models.

items.question: How do I replace the inner padding?
items.answer: Inner padding uses a snap-fit design for tool-free replacement. Gently pull the existing pads from the helmet shell, align the new pads with the snap points, and press firmly until they click into place. The whole process takes under a minute.

items.question: Can I wash the inner padding?
items.answer: Yes. Remove the padding from the helmet and hand wash with mild soap in lukewarm water. Air dry completely before reinstalling — do not machine wash or tumble dry. We recommend washing every 2–4 weeks depending on use.

items.question: What visor tint should I choose?
items.answer: Clear is best for low-light and night riding. Smoke reduces glare on bright days while maintaining color accuracy. Mirror provides maximum sun protection and a bold look — ideal for sunny conditions.

items.question: Do accessories come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes. All DLL accessories come with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects. This covers material and workmanship issues under normal use. Normal wear and tear (visor scratches, padding compression) is not covered.

about.label: About
about.title: Ride Smarter. Ride Safer.
story_paragraphs: DLL was founded with a simple mission: make cycling safer through smart technology. We believe every rider deserves equipment that actively protects them — not just on impact, but every second of the ride.

Our team of engineers and cycling enthusiasts designs helmets that integrate seamlessly with modern life. LED visibility, crash detection, and hands-free connectivity aren't luxury features — they're essentials for today's riders.
Based on years of research and real-world testing, DLL smart helmets represent the next generation of cycling safety.

values.title: Safety First
values.description: Every product decision starts with one question: does this make riders safer?

values.title: Smart Technology
values.description: We integrate the latest in sensors, connectivity, and lighting to create truly intelligent helmets.

values.title: Sustainable Design
values.description: We build products that last, using responsible materials and packaging wherever possible.

support_page.label: Help Center
support_page.title: How Can We Help?
support_page.subtitle: Find answers below or reach out to our team directly.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business day delivery. Free shipping is available on orders over $150.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on all products. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.

faqs.question: How do I connect my helmet via Bluetooth?
faqs.answer: Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds to enter pairing mode. The LED will flash blue. Then find 'DLL Helmet' in your phone's Bluetooth settings and tap to connect.

faqs.question: What is the battery life of the smart helmet?
faqs.answer: Our smart helmets provide 12+ hours of battery life with normal use. USB-C fast charging gets you from 0 to 80% in just 45 minutes.

faqs.question: Is the helmet certified for safety?
faqs.answer: Yes, all DLL helmets are certified to meet or exceed CPSC, EN 1078, and AS/NZS 2063 safety standards.

faqs.question: What does the warranty cover?
faqs.answer: DLL products come with a 2-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. Battery degradation beyond 80% capacity within the first year is also covered.
